title: Ensuring Truthful Advertising of Products Claiming To Be Made in America
summary: Executive Order 14392, signed by the President on March 13, 2026, aims to ensure truthful advertising of products claiming to be Made in America. The order emphasizes the public's right to accurate information about product origins and protects businesses that manufacture domestically. It directs the Federal Trade Commission (FTC) to prioritize enforcement against fraudulent "Made in America" claims and consider regulations for online marketplaces that fail to verify country-of-origin claims. Additionally, agencies overseeing country-of-origin labeling are to promote voluntary labeling, and agencies managing government contracts will review and verify "Buy American" claims, referring violators to the Department of Justice for potential False Claims Act actions.
